description_long: This is a vintage-style teapot with a robust, rounded metal body featuring a weathered copper finish and subtle greenish patina along the seams and edges. The spout is short, cylindrical, and slightly flared, projecting from the front of the teapot, while the handle is angular, metallic, and wrapped with a textured, tan material for grip. The lid is domed with concentric ridges and topped with a circular knob, fitting snugly into the teapot's opening. Decorative rivets and metal bands reinforce the body, giving it an industrial, steampunk aesthetic. The teapot sits on a circular wooden base, which contrasts with the metallic body and adds a rustic touch. No visible decorative patterns are present, but the aged finish and construction details provide visual interest.
description: A weathered copper teapot with a domed lid, angular handle wrapped in fabric, and a short, flared spout, all set on a round wooden base. Industrial rivets and patina give it a vintage, steampunk look.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen from the side, highlighting the angular handle with fabric wrapping and the short, flared spout extending forward.
description_view_1: The front view shows the circular opening of the spout and the symmetrical, rounded body of the teapot.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the first but from the opposite side, again showing the handle and spout, with the lid's knob clearly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view centers on the handle, showing its attachment points and the absence of the spout, with the lid's knob prominent at the top.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is straight, cylindrical, and projects horizontally from the front of the teapot.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is angular, metallic, attached at the top and bottom, and wrapped with a textured tan fabric for grip.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed with concentric ridges and a circular knob on top.
